hooks.command: CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] SessionStart PLUGIN_ROOT=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook session-start 2>> "$CK_LOG" && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] SessionStart OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] SessionStart FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true

CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] Stop" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook stop 2>> "$CK_LOG" && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] Stop OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] Stop FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true

CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] UserPromptSubmit" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook user-prompt 2>> "$CK_LOG" && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] UserPromptSubmit OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] UserPromptSubmit FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true

CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] PostToolUse" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook post-tool-use 2>> "$CK_LOG" && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] PostToolUse OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] PostToolUse FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true

CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] ExitPlanMode" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook exit-plan-mode 2>> "$CK_LOG" && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] ExitPlanMode OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] ExitPlanMode FAILED" >> "$CK_LOG"; true
